problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: If Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
